spec_match.rationale: Exercises a real surface of the spec's headline behaviour — animation-trigger / animation-range — declaratively start/pause/reset animations based on scroll position…

interactive.rationale: 1 buttons / 2 inputs / 1 selects / 2 ranges driving live JS — well past the static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Either the feature-index blurb or the concept lede is missing — can't verify alignment.

edge_cases.rationale: Page handles real failure modes — feature detection, permission rejection, fallback paths are all wired into the script.

references.rationale: The concept page now includes the required canonical ChromeStatus self-heal link https://chromestatus.com/feature/5181996801982464.

design_system.rationale: Mostly on the design system but 1 raw hex literal(s) leaked into inline CSS — should be replaced with the --accent / --text / --bg variables.

openQuestions.title: Replace raw hex colours with design-system variables
openQuestions.detail: Found 1 raw hex literal(s) in the inline <style> block. The shared system defines --accent-blue, --accent-emerald, --accent-rose, --bg-ivory, --bg-paper, --bg-stone, --text-black, --text-charcoal, --text-muted. Swap them in and re-check WCAG AA contrast.

openQuestions.title: Align the concept lede with the feature-index blurb
openQuestions.detail: The blurb on the feature index sells one promise; the concept lede frames a different angle. Either reword the lede to echo the blurb's keywords (so visitors recognise they're in the right place) or update the parent blurb.

summary: progressive-reveal under scroll-triggered-animations: 3 pass / 2 partial / 1 fail. Strong interactive surface, design-system drift, spec story complete. ChromeStatus reference link resolved.
